rulings.Case Title: SFBA INVESTMENT GROUP, LLC VS. JAYDIPSINH DEVDHARA ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Appoint Damyantiben Vikramsinh Devdhara As Successor-Ininterest To, And Substitute Successor-In-Interest For Deceased Defendant Vikramsinh Devdhara
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for October 15, 2021 line 1. RESPONDENT JAYDIPSINH DEVDHARA, VIKRAMSINH DEVDHARA Notice Of Motion And Motion To Appoint Damyantiben Vikramsinh Devdhara As Successor-Ininterest To, And Substitute Successor-In-Interest For Deceased Defendant Vikramsinh Devdhara is GRANTED, subject to the moving party providing a supplemental declaration stating whether (1) decedent had a will; and (2) whether decedent had other estate arrangements, e.g. trust. =(501/CFH) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 836 2280 0051; Password: 613303; or Phone Dial in: (415) 762-9988; Webinar ID: 836 2280 0051; Password: 613303). Parties who intend to appear at the hearing must give notice to opposing parties and the court promptly, but no later than 4:00 p.m. the court day before the hearing unless the tentative ruling has specified that a hearing is required. Notice of contesting a tentative ruling shall be provided by sending an email to the court to Department501ContestTR@sftc.org with a copy to all other parties stating, without argument, the portion(s) of the tentative ruling that the party contests. A party may not argue at the hearing if the opposing party is not so notified, and the opposing party does not appear.

rulings.Case Title: MICHAEL ZEHNER ET AL VS. DAVID VAN DER VOORT ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or In The Alternative Summary Adjudication
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for October 15, 2021 line 4. DEFENDANT DAVID VAN DER VOORT, TOMMI WEST MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or In The Alternative Summary Adjudication is DENIED. Motion for Summary Adjudication is DENIED. CRC 3.1350(b): compare Notice of Motion and Separate Statement. Motion for Summary Judgment is DENIED. Triable issues of fact exist, including but not limited to, additional facts 4, 6, 11, etc. Prevailing party to prepare order in accordance with CCP 473c(g). =(501/CFH) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 836 2280 0051; Password: 613303; or Phone Dial in: (415) 762-9988; Webinar ID: 836 2280 0051; Password: 613303). Parties who intend to appear at the hearing must give notice to opposing parties and the court promptly, but no later than 4:00 p.m. the court day before the hearing unless the tentative ruling has specified that a hearing is required. Notice of contesting a tentative ruling shall be provided by sending an email to the court to Department501ContestTR@sftc.org with a copy to all other parties stating, without argument, the portion(s) of the tentative ruling that the party contests. A party may not argue at the hearing if the opposing party is not so notified, and the opposing party does not appear.
